name: drypdf
description: Turn your AI into a librarian for your PDFs. Bundles the DRYPDF skill + the hosted DRYPDF MCP server (drypdf.com) so Codex can search, read, upload, and organize your stored PDFs, grounded in their actual text. Sign in and pick your account on first use.

interface.shortDescription: Turn your AI into a librarian for your PDFs.
interface.longDescription: Search, read, upload, and organize your stored PDFs from your agent, grounded in their actual text, via the hosted DRYPDF MCP server (drypdf.com). Sign in and pick your account on first use.
